themes.label: Guidance
themes.summary: This chapter emphasizes leading, direction, teaching, or the path God sets before His people. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Commentary leans on "Gregory the Dialogist on Morals on the Book of Job, Book XIV: The steps of his strength shalt...". Word-study detail reinforces "עֲצָתֽוֹ׃: and his own counsel - advice; by implication, plan; also prudence".

themes.label: Kingdom
themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse.
